name: @local/omp-prompt-stash
description: Local OMP prompt stash extension with configurable shortcuts.

shortcut.description: Global shortcut for stash/restore. Use none to disable. Restart OMP after changing.

deleteShortcuts.description: Comma-separated picker shortcuts that delete/remove the selected stash item. Use none to disable. Defaults avoid ctrl+d because ctrl+d is OMP's global TUI exit.

deleteAllShortcuts.description: Comma-separated picker shortcuts that ask to delete all stash items. Use none to disable.

storeFile.description: File name inside the OMP per-session prompt stash directory. Path components are ignored.

deduplicate.description: When stashing, remove older entries with identical text.

popupWidth.description: Preferred visual width for the centered picker panel.

listRows.description: Visible stash rows before the picker scrolls.
